projectId.description: ID of the project to set the user story to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

assigned_to.description: ID of the user to whom the user story is assigned. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

blocked_note.description: Reason why the user story is blocked. Requires "Is Blocked" toggle to be enabled.

is_blocked.description: Whether the user story is blocked

tags.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

milestone.description: ID of the milestone of the user story. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

priority.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

severity.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

status.description: ID of the status of the user story. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

type.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

taskboard_order.description: Order of the task in the taskboard

user_story.description: ID of the user story of the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

us_order.description: Order of the task in the user story

backlog_order.description: Order of the user story in the backlog

kanban_order.description: Order of the user story in the kanban

sprint_order.description: Order of the user story in the milestone

epicId.description: ID of the epic to update

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return
